task_description: Build a complete Music Search & Discovery web application using Next.js App Router, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. The app uses the iTunes Search API to let users search for songs/artists/albums, view song details with album artwork, play 30-second audio previews, and discover more songs by the same artist. No authentication, no database, fully client-ready and production-build passing.

verification.summary: npm run lint passes with 0 errors. npm run build succeeds generating routes / and /track/[id]. No test framework installed (only lint available). No Dockerfile present.
